title: linaria multicaulis subsp. gigantea
intro: Linaria multicaulis subsp. gigantea, also known as giant toadflax or large-flowered toadflax, is a plant species belonging to the family Plantaginaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to soothe respiratory issues and calm digestive problems. The health benefits of Linaria multicaulis subsp. gigantea include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
